---
title: "Configure Concert Operate"
format: html
---

### Configure Concert Operate: The How

This page covers the post-install configuration of Concert Operate: setting up event
ingestion, defining correlation policies, and configuring the ITSM integration.
At the end of this step, Concert Operate should be receiving events and applying
correlation rules.

#### Prerequisites

- Concert Operate installed and running (see [Install Concert Operate](install.qmd))
- Event source system accessible and able to reach the Concert Operate ingestion endpoint
- ServiceNow Event Management target available

#### Procedure

<!-- Document exact configuration steps as they are executed. Include screenshots or
     command output where helpful. Note deviations from documented path. -->

1.
2.
3.

#### Verification

<!-- Describe how to confirm configuration is correct: test event received, policy fired,
     incident created in ServiceNow, etc. -->
